creator: pawel@FreeBSD.org
text:
No need to send a distfile. Port's Makefile should be modified to
fetch and check distfile for the user. Doing my own research for 
distfile availability I found that sources can be downloaded
from BOINC GitHub page (see Tags/client_release* branches):

https://github.com/BOINC/boinc

Downloading can be done by using USE_GITHUB=yes and GH_* keywords.

Current version seems to be 7.6.33 right now.
